name: aether-mcp
description: MCP server for AETHER AI Signal Terminal — exposes market data, sentiment, and signal generation tools

tools.name: fetch_signal
tools.description: Fetch the current AI swarm signal for a cryptocurrency symbol

symbol.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT

tools.name: fetch_all_signals
tools.description: Fetch all active signals across all tracked pairs

tools.name: fetch_sentiment
tools.description: Fetch Elfa social sentiment for a symbol

tools.name: fetch_klines
tools.description: Fetch Bybit kline/candlestick data for a symbol

tools.name: vote_signal
tools.description: Cast a bull or bear vote on a signal

tools.name: fetch_leaderboard
tools.description: Get the current crowd sentiment leaderboard

resources.name: AETHER Architecture
resources.description: High-level system architecture and data flow

resources.name: Smart Contract Addresses
resources.description: Deployed contract addresses on Mantle Sepolia
